title_en: 3. The one who forgets to prostrate before the tasleem: 1. The opening takbeer cannot be said in any
title_ar: 3. The one who forgets to prostrate before the tasleem: 1. The opening takbeer cannot be said in any
content_en:
The one led in prayer is not required to make forgetfulness prostrations unless the imam does. The man led in prayer can draw the imam's or some other one's attention to something by saying, "subhanallah" and the woman by clapping. 189 International University in Latin America Self-assessment Questions Essay Questions: 1. State the pillars of prayer. 2. What are the obligatory acts of prayer? Place a check mark for correct answers and an 'X' for wrong answers:

language other than Arabic even if one cannot do it in Arabic. ( ) 2. Non-Arabs can recite Al-Fatihah in their languages unless they can do it Arabic. ( ) 3. Inability to recite surat Al-fatihah can be replaced by repeated dhikr. ( )
title_id: Orang yang Lupa Sujud Sahwi dan Takbiratul Ihram
content_id:
3. Orang yang lupa melakukan sujud sahwi sebelum salam dapat melakukannya setelah salam jika waktunya dekat. 1. Takbiratul ihram adalah syarat masuknya salat; tanpanya salat tidak sah.

Mengenai makmum yang terlambat (masbuq): jika ia mendapati imam sedang ruku, ia takbiratul ihram sambil berdiri lalu langsung ruku mengikuti imam. Jika ia masuk saat imam sedang ruku dan sempat ruku bersama imam, rakaatnya dihitung sah. Jika ia masuk setelah imam mengangkat kepala dari ruku, rakaat tersebut tidak terhitung dan ia harus mengganti setelah imam salam.
content_ar:
